concept: ** This abstract real-time strategy game challenges players to conquer an alternative world by commanding troops to capture all states on a map. Gameplay involves selecting owned states and dragging to send troops to neutral or enemy territories, with troops automatically generating in controlled regions. The objective is to strategically expand one's empire, blocking and destroying opponents' towers while defending borders, requiring careful tactical decisions over brute force. Progression unfolds across numerous levels, starting with 1v1 matches and escalating to more complex scenarios against multiple AI opponents on diverse maps. As a free-to-play title, monetization likely includes optional in-app purchases for in-game currency, speed-ups, or ad removal, though not explicitly stated.
name: State.io - Conquer the World
